description: The test vectors in this file check implementations of ECDH.
The underlying elliptic curve is brainpoolP192t1.
The ECDH computations in this file do not use a key derivation function.
The shared secret is derived directly from the x-coordinate of the shared point.
This file contains test vectors with PEM keys.

EdgeCaseArithmetic.desc: The test vector uses constructed values to check for arithmetic errors.

InvalidCurve.desc: The test vector contains a public key on the wrong curve.
InvalidCurve.effect: Accepting such public keys may lead to invalid curve attacks.

Unmodified.desc: This test vector contains a valid test case and should be valid. It is used as a basis to generate additional modified test vectors.
